context: Tests whether the SharePlay activities skill gives boundary-aware launch and sharing guidance.

checklist.name: Transferable share surfaces
checklist.description: States that SwiftUI ShareLink, SharePlay over AirDrop, and system share sheets require the activity or shared item to conform to Transferable.

checklist.name: Minimal shared payload
checklist.description: Keeps the Transferable payload minimal by sharing IDs, URLs, or activity descriptors instead of large media or documents.

checklist.name: Direct activation
checklist.description: Uses prepareForActivation() and activate() when a FaceTime call or Messages conversation is already active.

checklist.name: Participant picker
checklist.description: Uses GroupActivitySharingController when no active conversation exists and the app needs the user to pick participants.

checklist.name: Discoverable UI
checklist.description: Mentions the shareplay SF Symbol or equivalent affordance and concise GroupActivityMetadata as discoverability guidance.

checklist.name: GameKit boundary
checklist.description: Keeps GameKit authentication, leaderboards, matchmaking, achievements, and voice/chat out of the SharePlay implementation except for handoff boundaries.

checklist.name: TabletopKit boundary
checklist.description: Keeps TabletopKit board equipment, seats, actions, and tabletop mechanics outside the SharePlay layer while allowing a GroupActivities session coordination handoff.

checklist.name: AVKit boundary
checklist.description: Keeps AVKit playback UI and media player details outside the SharePlay layer while allowing AVPlayer session coordination handoffs.
